Title: Directs the department of health to collect certain data from relevant entities regarding calls and dispatches for emergency medical services
Summary: Directs the department of health to collect certain data from relevant entities, and designated public safety answering points to receive 911 service calls, regarding calls and dispatches for emergency medical services.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public health law, in relation to directing the department of health to collect certain data from entities regarding calls and dispatches for emergency medical services
